changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_logging_enabled to k8s_audit_logging_configured for clarity
Renamed k8s_audit_log_retention_configured to k8s_audit_log_retention_policy_set for specificity
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they relate to monitoring changes and configurations, which is a key aspect of continuous monitoring. The original names were mostly clear but needed slight adjustments for better clarity and specificity. Monitoring changes in network policies and admission controllers is a valid approach to implementing continuous monitoring in Kubernetes.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names clearly describe the configuration or monitoring aspect being checked.
title: Continuous Monitoring - Continuous monitoring | types of assessments [withdrawn
step1_reasoning: The control CA-7(2) focuses on continuous monitoring of changes, which can be applied to Kubernetes by ensuring audit logging is enabled and configured to retain logs for monitoring purposes. Additionally, monitoring changes to network policies and admission controllers can help detect unauthorized or unexpected changes, similar to how cloud services monitor changes to network configurations.
